headings: h2: Sign up to my newsletter
homepage.text_excerpt: Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Home About News In Parliament Whitestone Solar Farm Newsletter Activity Surgeries Campaigns Contact Useful Contacts Facebook Twitter Welcome This website is here to provide you with detailed information about my work as your MP and the Rother Valley constituency I am proud to represent. If you are a Rother Valley constituent and need to get in touch, you can do so by clicking here . As the elected Member of Parliament for Rother Valley, it’s an honour to represent our communities. I am here to serve every resident and ensure your concerns and ideas are heard. My goal is to champion the needs of our towns and villages, working to improve the services and opportunities that matter most to you. I hold appointment surgeries and frequently have street surgeries across the constituency. For more information, please visit my surgeries page by clicking here . Thank you for your trust and engagement as we work towards a brighter future for Rother Valley. pages.title: Jake Richards – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
pages.h1: Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
pages.text_excerpt: Jake Richards – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Home About News In Parliament Whitestone Solar Farm Newsletter Activity Surgeries Campaigns Contact Useful Contacts Facebook Twitter Jake Richards Rother Valley is my home. I live here with my wife and our daughter. I was elected to represent you in Parliament at the 2024 General Election on 4 July. Before being elected I was a Child Protection Barrister, representing some of the most vulnerable people in society. I came into politics to improve opportunities for people living here in Rother Valley. This will be my main focus every day. Facebook Twitter Jake Richards MP – Labour Member of Parliament for Rother Valley Copyright 2026 – Privacy Policy – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley

pages.h1: Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
pages.text_excerpt: Surgeries – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Home About News In Parliament Whitestone Solar Farm Newsletter Activity Surgeries Campaigns Contact Useful Contacts Facebook Twitter Surgeries I hold regular appointment advice surgeries at my office or online. If you would like to make an appointment please email me by clicking here . Street Surgeries I regularly have street surgeries across the constituency, where you can come and speak to me about your concerns. Upcoming Street Surgeries: Please get in touch to ask when our next street surgery will be near you What has Jake been up to in Rother Valley? You can see where Jake has done public events and street surgeries so far since being elected below: Map Key (Legend) Map Key Surgery Event / Visit OpenStreetMap with Leaflet – Rother Valley Boundary Filter by: Show All Street Surgeries Event / Visit Filter by Month: All Months Enable Clustering Facebook Twitter Jake Richards MP – Labour Member of Parliament for Rother Valley Copyright 2026 – Privacy Policy – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley

pages.title: Contact – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
pages.h1: Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
pages.text_excerpt: Contact – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley Home About News In Parliament Whitestone Solar Farm Newsletter Activity Surgeries Campaigns Contact Useful Contacts Facebook Twitter Contact You can email me at [email protected] k , and your email will be processed as soon as possible. You can alternatively fill out the form below. Before we can can process your enquiry, please check that you are one of my constituents. Is Jake my MP? > Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Please enable JavaScript in your browser to complete this form. Name * First Last Email * Telephone Street Address * Postcode * Reason for contact * I am a constituent and need Jake’s help I want to know Jake’s thoughts on a particular policy I want to volunteer or help with campaigning I want to receive Jake’s newsletter Other Comments * Submit You should also ensure that you have: Provided your full name. Provided your full postal address including post code. Provided a contact telephone number and an email address if you have one. IMPORTANT: If you have not included this information, please re-send your email as I am unable to process your enquiry without it. Email [email protected] Telephone 01909 384605 Postal Address 39 Laughton Road, Dinnington, S25 2PN Please note: The office is appointment only. If you require an appointment, please fill out the form above or email the office directly using [email protected] Facebook Twitter Jake Richards MP – Labour Member of Parliament for Rother Valley Copyright 2026 – Privacy Policy – Jake Richards MP for Rother Valley
